query:
SELECT fa.id, fa.inventoryItemId, fa.status, ii.stockNumber, ii.brand, ii.model, ii.year 
FROM facebookAds fa 
LEFT JOIN inventoryItems ii ON fa.inventoryItemId = ii.id 
WHERE fa.dealerId = 60001;
